title: Rohtak FINAL Election Result 2024: Bharat Bhushan Batra of INC Wins by...
text:
Rohtak FINAL Election Result 2024: Bharat Bhushan Batra of INC Wins by...
Detailed election result of Rohtak constituency in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election. Bharat Bhushan Batra is the new Rohtak MLA.
Bharat Bhushan Batra (INC) is the winner and elected as the MLA in the 2024 Rohtak Assembly election defeating Manish Kumar Grover (BJP) by a margin of 1,341 votes (1.11%) according to the data published by the Election Commission of India on October 8, 2024 for the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Rohtak detailed election result 2024
- 1. Bharat Bhushan Batra (Indian National Congress), 59419 votes (49.25%)
- 2. Manish Kumar Grover (Bharatiya Janata Party), 58078 votes (48.14%)
- 3. Bijender Hooda (Aam Aadmi Party), 1188 votes (0.98%)
- 4. NOTA (None of the Above), 569 votes (0.47%)
- 5. Dilour Mehra (Indian National Lok Dal), 428 votes (0.35%)
- 6. Jitender Balhara (Jannayak Janta Party), 268 votes (0.22%)
- 7. Parveen Kumar (Yuga Thulasi Party), 172 votes (0.14%)
- 8. Mahender Bagri (Mission Ekta Party), 138 votes (0.11%)
- 9. Bishamber Kumar (Independent), 98 votes (0.08%)
- 10. Bharat Bhushan (Independent), 87 votes (0.07%)
- 11. Manisha Mokhra (Socialist Unity Centre Of India (COMMUNIST)), 58 votes (0.05%)
- 12. Ashwani Malik (Independent), 38 votes (0.03%)
- 13. Yashpal (Independent), 32 votes (0.03%)
- 14. Anand Kumar (Independent), 30 votes (0.02%)
- 15. Navdeep Singh Raman (Independent), 27 votes (0.02%)
- 16. Surender Kumar (Independent), 18 votes (0.01%)
Past election results in Rohtak
In the 2019 Haryana Assembly elections, Bharat Bhushan Batra of INC won in this seat defeating Manish Kumar Grover of BJP by a margin of 2,735 which was 02.38% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 43.93% in 2019 in this seat.
In the 2014 Haryana Assembly elections, Manish Kumar Grover of BJP won in this seat defeating Bharat Bhushan Batra of INC by a margin of 11,132 which was 9.75% of the total votes cast for the seat. BJP had a vote share of 50.55% in 2014 in this seat.
In the 2009 Haryana Assembly elections, Bharat Bhushan Batra of INC won in this seat defeating Manish Grover of BJP by a margin of 19,595 which was 23.58% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 56.62% in 2009 in this seat.
Rohtak Assembly seat – Lok Sabha results
Rohtak Assembly constituency is part of 7. Rohtak (General) Lok Sabha constituency. In the 2024 Lok Sabha elections, INC was the leading party in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Dr. Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP.
In the 2019 Lok Saba polls, BJP led in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP beating Deepender Singh Hooda of INC.
In 2014, INC was ahead in this particular assembly segment and the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Om Parkash Dhankar of BJP.
In the 2009 Parliamentary elections, INC was the leading party in the Rohtak assembly segment while the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh of INC defeating Nafe Singh Rathee of INLD.
Voter turnout in Rohtak
According to data released by the Election Commission of India, in the 2024 Haryana Assembly elections, the voter turnout in Rohtak constituency was 59.96%. In 2019, this seat registered a turnout of 60.20%, while it was 65.85% in 2014 and 62.17% in 2009. The estimated turnout in 2024 was +0.24% compared to the 2019 turnout.
List of contesting candidates and candidate profiles
15 candidates were in the fray for the Rohtak Assembly seat in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Brief profiles of candidates contesting from Rohtak in the 2024 elections sourced from the affidavits submitted by the candidates with the Election Commission of India and as analysed by the Association of Democratic Reforms (ADR):
- Anand Kumar, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 50 years; Profession: Advocate; Education: Graduate Professional; Total assets: Rs 45.6 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Ashwani Malik, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 32 years; Profession: Contractor; Education: Graduate Professional; Total assets: Rs 35.5 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 1.
- Bharat Bhushan Batra, Indian National Congress (INC); Gender: Male; Age: 72 years; Profession: Advocate; Education: Graduate Professional; Total assets: Rs 13.8 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Bharat Bhushan, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 48 years; Profession: Self Employed; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 83.9 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Bijender Hooda, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP); Gender: Male; Age: 52 years; Profession: Property Dealer; Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 1.3 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 5.
- Bishamber Kumar, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 59 years; Profession: Business; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 49.4 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Dilour Mehra, Indian National Lok Dal (INLD); Gender: Male; Age: 40 years; Profession: Labour; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 9.8 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Jitender Balhara, Jannayak Janta Party (JJP); Gender: Male; Age: 49 years; Profession: Business; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 1 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Mahender Bagri, Mission Ekta Party (MEP); Gender: Male; Age: 27 years; Profession: Business (Internet Cafe Shop); Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 37.7 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 2.
- Manish Kumar Grover, Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP); Gender: Male; Age: 70 years; Profession: Pensioner being the Ex-MLA; Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 5 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Manisha Mokhra, Socialist Unity Centre Of India (COMMUNIST) (SUCIC); Gender: Female; Age: 31 years; Profession: NIL; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 15.6 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Navdeep Singh Raman, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 33 years; Profession: Advocate; Education: Graduate Professional; Total assets: Rs 4.6 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Parveen Kumar, Yuga Thulasi Party (YTP); Gender: Male; Age: 38 years; Profession: Pvt. Job; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 17000; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Surender Kumar, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 47 years; Profession: Pensioner being the Ex-Assistant (Reader Grade IIIrd); Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 1 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Yashpal, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 38 years; Profession: Fabricator; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 8.3 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
